Title: 18 ft Reach MPXA Aluminum Multi-Position Ladder with Tool Hangers, 300 lbs Load Capacity
Body (HTML):
Lightweight. Durable. Easy to Use. And now featuring Gorilla's innovative tool storage solutions to help you get your projects done even more quickly, easily, and safely! The newly-designed Gorilla Ladders 18 ft. Reach Aluminum Multi-Position Ladder now has built-in tool hangers on the armored feet and on the hinge knobs, ensuring you'll always have a place to hang your tools while working and climbing. With 20 telescoping adjustable heights, this ladder can be used as an Extension Ladder, Double-Sided Twin Stepladder, 90-degree Wall Ladder, Stairway Stepladder, and as 2 Scaffold Bases (with the purchase of the Rail Brackets accessory) while still folding down to a compact package for easy storage and transport. Extra-large, heavy-duty MPXA hinges are easy to use and give you improved strength and rigidity while climbing for an added sense of security, and the smart rail design makes this ladder lighter yet stronger than comparable models. With plenty of added features and the same lightweight, easy-to-use design, this Gorilla Ladder is truly "Built Smart and Always Tough."
  • Lightweight aluminum design is easy-to-use and transport
  • Integrated tool hangers in hinge knobs and feet for additional storage and safe, secure working
  • Durable design with Type 1A ANSI Duty Rating (rated to hold up to 300 lbs.)
  • Oversized hinges improve rigidity and reduce flex when climbing
  • Limited lifetime warranty
  • Rail brackets (for use in scaffold position) are available on HomeDepot.com

Title: Timberline HDZ Charcoal Algae Resistant Laminated High Definition Shingles (33.33 sq. ft. per Bundle) (21-Pieces)
Body (HTML):
We took our signature #1-selling shingle, Timberline HD and transformed it by strengthening the common bond and creating the industry's largest nailing zone. Timberline HDZ Shingles have the same renowned Timberline quality and performance you know and love, with improved nailing accuracy and installation efficiency. Timberline HDZ Shingles are easy and fast to install, with an incredible 99.9% nail placement accuracy. Results based on study conducted by Home Innovation Research Labs, an independent research lab, comparing installation of Timberline HD Shingles to Timberline HDZ Shingles on a 16-square roof deck using standard 4-nail nailing pattern under controlled laboratory conditions. Actual results may vary.

  • New StrikeZone Nailing Area is the industry's largest nail zone designed for high visibility, ease of installation, and maximum accuracy
  • 25-year StainGuard Plus Algae Protection Limited Warranty
  • Proprietary LayerLock Technology mechanically fastens the common bond, allowing for a larger nailing area - up to 600% larger nailing target** (**Compared to Timberline HD Shingles)
  • A dimensional look that features GAF's proprietary color blends and enhanced shadow effect for a genuine wood-shake look

Title: 4.5 gal. All Purpose Ready-Mixed Joint Compound
Body (HTML):
USG Sheetrock Brand All Purpose Joint Compound is the original, most-trusted conventional weight all purpose, ready-mixed joint compound for all phases of drywall finishing. Use for repairing cracks on drywall and plaster, embedding USG Sheetrock Brand Paper Joint Tape, and applying drywall filling and finishing coats. May also be used for covering fasteners and USG Sheetrock Brand Corner Bead and Trim, skim coating drywall surfaces, and hand-applying simple textures. USG ready-mixed joint compounds are preferred for consistently high-quality work. Superior formulations are premixed to a creamy, smooth consistency and are essentially free of crater-causing air bubbles. They can be used in hand or machine-tool applications and offer excellent slip, bond, and easy workability.
  • Pre-mixed compound for minimal mixing, thinning, and retempering
  • Superior filling and finishing
  • Provides top-quality bond and hard finish surface

Title: FOAMULAR NGX F-250 2 in. x 4 ft. x 8 ft. SSE R-10 XPS Rigid Foam Board Insulation
Body (HTML):
Owens Corning FOAMULAR NGX (Next Generation Extruded) insulation, is produced with a proprietary blowing agent that delivers a 90% reduction to Global Warming Potential (100 year) compared to current FOAMULAR. The new formulation and production process meets or exceeds new, more stringent regulatory standards without sacrificing product performance and offers a comprehensive line of products in a wide choice of sizes, thicknesses and edges with a Lifetime limited warranty for the life of the home or building. Foam insulation boards are easy to handle, score, cut and install & no special tools are needed. Foam insulation products can be used on wood, steel framing or concrete walls. FOAMULAR NGX resists moisture and retains R-value even after exposure to standing water and wet soil. Owens Corning FOAMULAR NGX insulation offers all the physical properties and ease-of-use you expect from Owens Corning FOAMULAR insulation with industry-leading sustainability.
  • Completely eliminates use of HFC 1
  • Manufactured with a blowing agent formulation that delivers a 90% reduction to global warming potential (100-year)1
  • Excellent energy efficiency in the form of a high R-5 per inch
  • Extremely low water absorption potential, delivering superior R-value retention in the presence of water
  • Wide range of compressive strengths - up to 100 psi - to handle heavy loads
  • Only XPS with a limited lifetime warranty that guarantees a minimum 90% of R-value for the life of the product
  • ENERGY STAR
  • When using foamular or any low perm insulation, always verify the moisture vapor flow and dew point characteristics of the wall system, please check your local building codes for vapor retarder/barrier information
  • Being used in an interior construction application, painting the fo is not recommended as foamular cannot be left exposed and will need to be covered by a 15-minute thermal barrier such as drywall
  • If being used for crafts, acrylic or latex based paints can be used with foamular products
  • If you're looking to insulate your garage door, owens corning garage door insulation Kit is an easy, fast and affordable way to keep your garage warm in winter and cool in the summer
  • If you're looking to ventilate your attic rafters, owens corning Raft-R-Mate is a XPS foam vent designed to assure unrestricted airflow from the soffit to the ridge vent
  • FOAMULAR is available in 2 edge configurations
  • Square edge - designed to fit flush next to adjoining boards
  • Scored square edge - comes with 3 factory scores, so that you can take a 4 ft. sheet, break it in 2 and have two, 2 ft.wide sheets (middle score) or you can break it into three 16 in. wide pieces by snapping at the left and right score
  • GREENGUARD
  • Click here to shop Owens Corning Foam Board Insulation styles
  • Foamular is not rated for STC (sound transmission) and does not have any soundproofing properties. owens corning fiberglass batts and rolls are great options for acoustic applications

Title: 887 Tropi-Cool 100% Silicone White Roof Coating 4.75 gal.
Body (HTML):
Henry 887 Tropi-Cool 100% Silicone White Roof Coating is a premium, 100% silicone, moisture-cure coating designed to reflect the sun's heat and UV rays as well as protect many types of roofs. Now with Dirt Pick-Up Resistance (DPR) Technology, it will keep your roof whiter and brighter longer. While suitable for use in all climates, the 100% silicone chemistry is especially suited for extreme tropical environments, which are exposed to some of the hottest and wettest weather with intense UV exposure. It is specially designed to maintain maximum reflectivity of heat and UV rays as it ages. Its moisture-cure chemistry creates a very aggressive chemical bond with the roof, which allows for permanent ponding water resistance, extreme durability, and superior capabilities of sealing and protection.

  • Dirt Pick-Up Resistance (DPR) technology formula - Stays whiter and brighter longer

  • Helps prevent dirt and dust buildup
  • Rain‐safe in 15‐minutes
  • 1-coat application
  • Wide application temperature range from 35 °F to 120 °F (2 °C to 49 °C)
  • Permanent ponding water resistant
  • Superior UV resistance and weathering performance

  • Mold and mildew resistant
  • Chemically bonds with roof substrates as it cures

Title: 5/8 in. x 4 ft. x 8 ft. EcoSmart Firecode X Drywall
Body (HTML):
USG Sheetrock Brand EcoSmart Panels Firecode X are lightweight, fire-resistant gypsum panels that achieve the same strength and performance characteristics as standard 5/8 in. Sheetrock Brand Firecode X Panels at a lower environmental impact and reduced weight. They feature an innovative, noncombustible gypsum core encased in 100% recycled face and back papers. Long edges of the panels are tapered for easy finishing, allowing joints to be reinforced and concealed with Sheetrock Brand joint treatment systems. UL Classified for fire resistance, they can be used in any UL Design in which Type FC30 panels are listed. The UL Type Designation is printed on the face along the long edge of each panel for easy identification by building inspectors.
  • Offers comparable sound, strength and sag resistance to standard 5/8 in. Type X
  • Ideal for commercial or residential applications where 5/8 in. Type X panels are required, including load-bearing and nonload-bearing wood- or steel-framed fire-rated walls
  • Comply with ASTM C1396, Standard Specification for Gypsum Board
  • UL Classification as to fire resistance, surface-burning characteristics and noncombustibility
  • Listed by UL in the most widely specified wall, column, floor- and roof-ceiling assemblies and horizontal membranes
  • GREENGUARD Gold certified for low-emitting performance
  • Meet Architecture 2030 Challenge for Products: up to 25% less global warming potential; up to 30% less weight reduces transportation fuel energy by up to 20%
  • Contain 100% USDA certified biobased content

Title: 18 lb. Easy Sand 20 Lightweight Setting-Type Joint Compound
Body (HTML):
USG Sheetrock Brand Easy Sand 20 Joint Compound is a lightweight, setting-type compound with a 20-minute working time. USG setting-type joint compounds provide faster finishing of drywall interiors, even under slow drying conditions. Rapid chemical hardening and low shrinkage permit same-day finishing and usually next-day decoration. USG Sheetrock Brand Easy Sand 20 Joint Compound features an exceptional bond; virtually unaffected by humidity extremes. It is ideal for laminating double-layer systems, particularly fire-rated assemblies, and for adhering gypsum panels to above-grade concrete surfaces. May also be used for surface texturing and for filling, smoothing and finishing interior above-grade concrete. Note: Setting-type joint compounds should not be used for skim coating due to dryout concerns.
  • Weigh up to 25% less than conventional weight setting-type joint compounds
  • Sands easily; similar to a ready-mixed, all-purpose joint compound
  • Unique humidity resistance
  • Check-crack resistance in heavy ﬁlls
  • For interior gypsum panels and exterior gypsum ceiling boards
  • GREENGUARD Gold certified for low-emitting performance

  • FOAMULAR 150 and 250 are available in various thicknesses and R-values, the difference is the compressive strength. FOAMULAR 150 has a compressive strength of 15 psi and FOAMULAR 250 is 25 psi
  • FOAMULAR is not rated for STC (sound transmission) and does not have any soundproofing properties. Owens Corning fiberglass batts and rolls are great options for acoustic applications.
  • When using FOAMULAR or any low perm insulation, always verify the moisture vapor flow and dew point characteristics of the wall system. Please check your local building codes for vapor retarder/barrier information.
  • If being used in an interior construction application, painting the FOAMULAR is not recommended as FOAMULAR cannot be left exposed and will need to be covered by a 15 minute thermal barrier such as drywall.
  • If being used for crafts, acrylic or latex based paints can be used with FOAMULAR products.
  • If you're looking to insulate your garage door, Owens Corning Garage Door Insulation Kit is an easy, fast and affordable way to keep your garage warm in winter and cool in the summer.
  • If you're looking to ventilate your attic rafters, Owens Corning Raft-R-Mate is a XPS foam vent designed to assure unrestricted airflow from the soffit to the ridge vent.
  • FOAMULAR is available in two edge configurations:
  • Square Edge - designed to fit flush next to adjoining boards
  • Scored Square Edge - comes with 3 factory scores, so that you can take a 4' sheet, break it in two and have two, 2' wide sheets (middle score), or you can break it into three 16" wide pieces by snapping at the left and right score.
